title: Expand deterministic core coverage
goal: Increase deterministic test coverage for relationship-map and scope/path edge cases.

steps.text: Identify highest-risk untested graph and scope behaviors.
Add deterministic tests that capture merge ordering, missing-node, and edge-deduplication behavior.
Add scope/path edge-case tests without broad source rewrites.
Run tests and report residual coverage gaps clearly.

acceptanceCriteria: High-risk graph behaviors have deterministic coverage
Scope and path edge-case tests are added
No timing-sensitive flaky assertions are introduced
No agent may introduce or use @unchecked Sendable anywhere in code, tests, or tooling context unless explicitly approved by the repository owner for that exact change

verification.text: Review new tests for determinism and focused scope
